label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma about whether friends should continue inviting someone in Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) to their drinking outings. Let me start by understanding the situation better. There's a group of friends who often go out drinking on the weekends. One of the friends has recently started attending AA, which suggests he might be struggling with alcoholism or is in recovery. The group wants to include him in their outings, but they're concerned about potentially triggering a relapse if he's around alcohol again. On the other hand, if they exclude him, he might feel isolated from the group. The dilemma is whether to include him despite the risk or exclude
